goal: Create test_bookmark.py with comprehensive pytest tests for the bookmark manager. Test all BookmarkStore methods: add, get, delete, list_all, search, search_by_tag. Use a temporary JSON file (use tmp_path fixture). Include at least 3 test cases per method, covering edge cases like: empty store, non-existent id, case-insensitive search, multiple tags, duplicate URLs. Then run all tests to make sure everything works.
